mapper.select: SELECT 'listening' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, lq.id AS id, lq.test_id AS test_id, lq.part_group_id AS passage_id, lq.id AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, COALESCE(lpg.title, CONCAT('Listening Question ', lq.question_number)) AS title, lt.title AS test_title, lpg.title AS passage_title, lpg.instruction_text AS content, COALESCE(lpg.group_guide_text, lpg.instruction_text) AS passage_content, lq.question_text AS question_text, lq.correct_answer AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, lq.question_number AS question_number, lq.question_type AS question_type, lq.answer_mode AS answer_mode, lq.options_json AS options_json, lq.accepted_answers_json AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, la.transcript_text AS transcript_text, la.audio_url AS audio_url, la.audio_object_key AS audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'LISTENING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = lpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS image_url, NULL AS task_type FROM listening_question lq JOIN listening_test lt ON lt.id = lq.test_id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_part_group lpg ON lpg.id = lq.part_group_id AND lpg.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_audio la ON la.part_group_id = lq.part_group_id AND la.audio_scope = 'part_group' AND la.is_deleted = 0 WHERE lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, rq.id AS id, rp.test_id AS test_id, rq.passage_id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, COALESCE(rq.group_label, rp.title, CONCAT('Reading Question ', rq.question_number)) AS title, rt.title AS test_title, rp.title AS passage_title, rp.content AS content, rp.content AS passage_content, rq.question_text AS question_text, rq.correct_answer AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, rq.question_number AS question_number, rq.question_type AS question_type, rq.answer_mode AS answer_mode, rq.options_json AS options_json, rq.accepted_answers_json AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'READING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = rpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS image_url, NULL AS task_type FROM reading_question rq JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.id = rq.passage_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rp.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_part_group rpg ON rpg.id = rq.part_group_id AND rpg.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'speaking' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, sq.id AS id, NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, sq.id AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, COALESCE(sq.topic_key, CONCAT(sq.part, ' ', sq.sub_type)) AS title, NULL AS test_title, NULL AS passage_title, sq.cue_card AS content, sq.cue_card AS passage_content, sq.question_text AS question_text, NULL AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, sq.display_order AS question_number, sq.sub_type AS question_type, 'SPEECH' AS answer_mode, NULL AS options_json, NULL AS accepted_answers_json, sq.cue_card AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, NULL AS image_url, sq.part AS task_type FROM speaking_question sq WHERE sq.id = #{questionId} AND sq.is_deleted = 0 AND sq.active = 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module, 'question' AS object_type, wq.id AS id, NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, wq.id AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, COALESCE(wq.title, CONCAT('Writing ', wq.task_type)) AS title, NULL AS test_title, NULL AS passage_title, wq.description AS content, wq.description AS passage_content, COALESCE(wq.title, wq.description) AS question_text, NULL AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, NULL AS question_number, wq.task_type AS question_type, 'ESSAY' AS answer_mode, NULL AS options_json, NULL AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, COALESCE( ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'WRITING_QUESTION' AND bir.target_id = wq.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), wq.image_url ) AS image_url, wq.task_type AS task_type FROM writing_question wq WHERE wq.id = #{questionId} AND wq.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'passage' AS object_type, rp.id AS id, rp.test_id AS test_id, rp.id AS passage_id, NULL AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, rp.title AS title, rt.title AS test_title, rp.title AS passage_title, rp.content AS content, rp.content AS passage_content, NULL AS question_text, NULL AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, rp.passage_no AS question_number, rp.material_type AS question_type, NULL AS answer_mode, NULL AS options_json, NULL AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'READING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = rp.part_group_id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS image_url, NULL AS task_type FROM reading_passage rp JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rp.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rp.id = #{passageId} AND rp.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'listening' AS module, 'test' AS object_type, lt.id AS id, lt.id AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, NULL AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, lt.title AS title, lt.title AS test_title, NULL AS passage_title, NULL AS content, NULL AS passage_content, NULL AS question_text, NULL AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, NULL AS question_number, NULL AS question_type, NULL AS answer_mode, NULL AS options_json, NULL AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, NULL AS image_url, NULL AS task_type FROM listening_test lt WHERE lt.id = #{testId} AND lt.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'reading' AS module, 'test' AS object_type, rt.id AS id, rt.id AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, NULL AS question_id, NULL AS record_id, rt.title AS title, rt.title AS test_title, NULL AS passage_title, NULL AS content, NULL AS passage_content, NULL AS question_text, NULL AS correct_answer, NULL AS explanation, NULL AS question_number, NULL AS question_type, NULL AS answer_mode, NULL AS options_json, NULL AS accepted_answers_json, NULL AS cue_card, NULL AS transcript_text, NULL AS audio_url, NULL AS audio_object_key, NULL AS image_url, NULL AS task_type FROM reading_test rt WHERE rt.id = #{testId} AND rt.is_deleted = 0

SELECT 'listening' AS module, lr.user_id AS user_id, lr.id AS record_id, lr.test_id AS test_id, lq.part_group_id AS passage_id, lq.id AS question_id, lr.session_id AS session_id, lar.user_answer AS user_answer, lar.is_correct AS correct, lar.score AS score, lr.total_score AS total_score, NULL AS feedback, NULL AS ai_feedback, NULL AS ai_score, NULL AS text_content, NULL AS extracted_text, NULL AS transcript, NULL AS audio_url, lr.record_status AS answer_status, NULL AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(lr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM listening_record lr JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_answer_record lar ON lar.record_id = lr.id AND lar.question_id = lq.id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module, rr.user_id AS user_id, rr.id AS record_id, rr.test_id AS test_id, rq.passage_id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id, rr.session_id AS session_id, rar.user_answer AS user_answer, rar.is_correct AS correct, rar.score AS score, rr.total_score AS total_score, NULL AS feedback, NULL AS ai_feedback, NULL AS ai_score, NULL AS text_content, NULL AS extracted_text, NULL AS transcript, NULL AS audio_url, rr.record_status AS answer_status, NULL AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(rr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM reading_record rr JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.id = rq.passage_id AND rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_answer_record rar ON rar.record_id = rr.id AND rar.question_id = rq.id WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'speaking' AS module, sr.user_id AS user_id, sr.id AS record_id, NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, sr.question_id AS question_id, sr.session_id AS session_id, NULL AS user_answer, NULL AS correct, sr.overall_score AS score, sr.overall_score AS total_score, sr.feedback AS feedback, NULL AS ai_feedback, sr.overall_score AS ai_score, NULL AS text_content, NULL AS extracted_text, sr.transcript AS transcript, sr.audio_url AS audio_url, sr.answer_status AS answer_status, sr.ai_status AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.id = #{recordId} AND sr.question_id = #{questionId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module, wr.user_id AS user_id, wr.id AS record_id, NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id, wr.question_id AS question_id, NULL AS session_id, NULL AS user_answer, NULL AS correct, wr.ai_score AS score, wr.ai_score AS total_score, NULL AS feedback, wr.ai_feedback AS ai_feedback, wr.ai_score AS ai_score, wr.text_content AS text_content, wr.extracted_text AS extracted_text, NULL AS transcript, NULL AS audio_url, wr.input_type AS answer_status, wr.ai_status AS ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(wr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_time FROM writing_record wr WHERE wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.id = #{recordId} AND wr.question_id = #{questionId} AND wr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'listening' AS module, lr.id AS record_id, lr.test_id AS test_id, lq.part_group_id AS passage_id, lq.id AS question_id, lq.question_number AS question_number, lq.question_text AS question_text FROM listening_record lr JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY lq.question_number ASC, lq.display_order ASC, lq.id ASC

SELECT 'reading' AS module, rr.id AS record_id, rr.test_id AS test_id, rq.passage_id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id, rq.question_number AS question_number, rq.question_text AS question_text FROM reading_record rr JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rq.question_number ASC, rq.display_order ASC, rq.id ASC

SELECT lr.test_id AS test_id, lq.part_group_id AS passage_id, lq.id AS question_id FROM listening_record lr JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 AND lq.question_number = #{questionNumber} ORDER BY lq.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT rr.test_id AS test_id, rq.passage_id AS passage_id, rq.id AS question_id FROM reading_record rr JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 AND rq.question_number = #{questionNumber} ORDER BY rq.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT 'listening' AS module, NULL AS ask_scene,
'listening' AS test_module, 'test' AS test_object_type, lt.id AS test_id, lt.id AS test_test_id, NULL AS test_passage_id, NULL AS test_question_id, NULL AS test_record_id, lt.title AS test_title, lt.title AS test_test_title, NULL AS test_passage_title, NULL AS test_content, NULL AS test_passage_content, NULL AS test_question_text, NULL AS test_correct_answer, NULL AS test_explanation, NULL AS test_question_number, NULL AS test_question_type, NULL AS test_answer_mode, NULL AS test_options_json, NULL AS test_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS test_cue_card, NULL AS test_transcript_text, NULL AS test_audio_url, NULL AS test_audio_object_key, NULL AS test_image_url, NULL AS test_task_type,
'listening' AS passage_module, 'passage' AS passage_object_type, lpg.id AS passage_id, lt.id AS passage_test_id, lpg.id AS passage_passage_id, NULL AS passage_question_id, NULL AS passage_record_id, lpg.title AS passage_title, lt.title AS passage_test_title, lpg.title AS passage_passage_title, lpg.instruction_text AS passage_content, COALESCE(lpg.group_guide_text, lpg.instruction_text) AS passage_passage_content, NULL AS passage_question_text, NULL AS passage_correct_answer, NULL AS passage_explanation, lpg.group_number AS passage_question_number, NULL AS passage_question_type, NULL AS passage_answer_mode, NULL AS passage_options_json, NULL AS passage_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS passage_cue_card, la.transcript_text AS passage_transcript_text, la.audio_url AS passage_audio_url, la.audio_object_key AS passage_audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'LISTENING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = lpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS passage_image_url, NULL AS passage_task_type,
'listening' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, lq.id AS question_id, lt.id AS question_test_id, lq.part_group_id AS question_passage_id, lq.id AS question_question_id, NULL AS question_record_id, COALESCE(lpg.title, CONCAT('Listening Question ', lq.question_number)) AS question_title, lt.title AS question_test_title, lpg.title AS question_passage_title, lpg.instruction_text AS question_content, COALESCE(lpg.group_guide_text, lpg.instruction_text) AS question_passage_content, lq.question_text AS question_question_text, lq.correct_answer AS question_correct_answer, NULL AS question_explanation, lq.question_number AS question_question_number, lq.question_type AS question_question_type, lq.answer_mode AS question_answer_mode, lq.options_json AS question_options_json, lq.accepted_answers_json AS question_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS question_cue_card, la.transcript_text AS question_transcript_text, la.audio_url AS question_audio_url, la.audio_object_key AS question_audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'LISTENING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = lpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS question_image_url, NULL AS question_task_type,
'listening' AS user_attempt_module, lr.user_id AS user_attempt_user_id, lr.id AS user_attempt_record_id, lr.test_id AS user_attempt_test_id, lq.part_group_id AS user_attempt_passage_id, lq.id AS user_attempt_question_id, lr.session_id AS user_attempt_session_id, lar.user_answer AS user_attempt_user_answer, lar.is_correct AS user_attempt_correct, lar.score AS user_attempt_score, lr.total_score AS user_attempt_total_score, NULL AS user_attempt_feedback, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_feedback, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_score, NULL AS user_attempt_text_content, NULL AS user_attempt_extracted_text, NULL AS user_attempt_transcript, NULL AS user_attempt_audio_url, lr.record_status AS user_attempt_answer_status, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(lr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS user_attempt_created_time FROM listening_record lr JOIN listening_test lt ON lt.id = lr.test_id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 JOIN listening_question lq ON lq.id = #{questionId} AND lq.test_id = lr.test_id AND lq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_part_group lpg ON lpg.id = lq.part_group_id AND lpg.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_audio la ON la.part_group_id = lq.part_group_id AND la.audio_scope = 'part_group' AND la.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN listening_answer_record lar ON lar.record_id = lr.id AND lar.question_id = lq.id WHERE lr.user_id = #{userId} AND lr.id = #{recordId} AND lr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'reading' AS module, NULL AS ask_scene,
'reading' AS test_module, 'test' AS test_object_type, rt.id AS test_id, rt.id AS test_test_id, NULL AS test_passage_id, NULL AS test_question_id, NULL AS test_record_id, rt.title AS test_title, rt.title AS test_test_title, NULL AS test_passage_title, NULL AS test_content, NULL AS test_passage_content, NULL AS test_question_text, NULL AS test_correct_answer, NULL AS test_explanation, NULL AS test_question_number, NULL AS test_question_type, NULL AS test_answer_mode, NULL AS test_options_json, NULL AS test_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS test_cue_card, NULL AS test_transcript_text, NULL AS test_audio_url, NULL AS test_audio_object_key, NULL AS test_image_url, NULL AS test_task_type,
'reading' AS passage_module, 'passage' AS passage_object_type, rp.id AS passage_id, rp.test_id AS passage_test_id, rp.id AS passage_passage_id, NULL AS passage_question_id, NULL AS passage_record_id, rp.title AS passage_title, rt.title AS passage_test_title, rp.title AS passage_passage_title, rp.content AS passage_content, rp.content AS passage_passage_content, NULL AS passage_question_text, NULL AS passage_correct_answer, NULL AS passage_explanation, rp.passage_no AS passage_question_number, rp.material_type AS passage_question_type, NULL AS passage_answer_mode, NULL AS passage_options_json, NULL AS passage_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS passage_cue_card, NULL AS passage_transcript_text, NULL AS passage_audio_url, NULL AS passage_audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'READING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = rpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS passage_image_url, NULL AS passage_task_type,
'reading' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, rq.id AS question_id, rp.test_id AS question_test_id, rq.passage_id AS question_passage_id, rq.id AS question_question_id, NULL AS question_record_id, COALESCE(rq.group_label, rp.title, CONCAT('Reading Question ', rq.question_number)) AS question_title, rt.title AS question_test_title, rp.title AS question_passage_title, rp.content AS question_content, rp.content AS question_passage_content, rq.question_text AS question_question_text, rq.correct_answer AS question_correct_answer, NULL AS question_explanation, rq.question_number AS question_question_number, rq.question_type AS question_question_type, rq.answer_mode AS question_answer_mode, rq.options_json AS question_options_json, rq.accepted_answers_json AS question_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS question_cue_card, NULL AS question_transcript_text, NULL AS question_audio_url, NULL AS question_audio_object_key, ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'READING_PART_GROUP' AND bir.target_id = rpg.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS question_image_url, NULL AS question_task_type,
'reading' AS user_attempt_module, rr.user_id AS user_attempt_user_id, rr.id AS user_attempt_record_id, rr.test_id AS user_attempt_test_id, rq.passage_id AS user_attempt_passage_id, rq.id AS user_attempt_question_id, rr.session_id AS user_attempt_session_id, rar.user_answer AS user_attempt_user_answer, rar.is_correct AS user_attempt_correct, rar.score AS user_attempt_score, rr.total_score AS user_attempt_total_score, NULL AS user_attempt_feedback, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_feedback, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_score, NULL AS user_attempt_text_content, NULL AS user_attempt_extracted_text, NULL AS user_attempt_transcript, NULL AS user_attempt_audio_url, rr.record_status AS user_attempt_answer_status, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(rr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS user_attempt_created_time FROM reading_record rr JOIN reading_passage rp ON rp.test_id = rr.test_id AND rp.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id AND rt.is_deleted = 0 JOIN reading_question rq ON rq.id = #{questionId} AND rq.passage_id = rp.id AND rq.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_part_group rpg ON rpg.id = rq.part_group_id AND rpg.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN reading_answer_record rar ON rar.record_id = rr.id AND rar.question_id = rq.id WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.id = #{recordId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'writing' AS module, NULL AS ask_scene,
NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id,
'writing' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, wq.id AS question_id, NULL AS question_test_id, NULL AS question_passage_id, wq.id AS question_question_id, NULL AS question_record_id, COALESCE(wq.title, CONCAT('Writing ', wq.task_type)) AS question_title, NULL AS question_test_title, NULL AS question_passage_title, wq.description AS question_content, wq.description AS question_passage_content, COALESCE(wq.title, wq.description) AS question_question_text, NULL AS question_correct_answer, NULL AS question_explanation, NULL AS question_question_number, wq.task_type AS question_question_type, 'ESSAY' AS question_answer_mode, NULL AS question_options_json, NULL AS question_accepted_answers_json, NULL AS question_cue_card, NULL AS question_transcript_text, NULL AS question_audio_url, NULL AS question_audio_object_key, COALESCE( ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'WRITING_QUESTION' AND bir.target_id = wq.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), wq.image_url ) AS question_image_url, wq.task_type AS question_task_type,
'writing' AS user_attempt_module, wr.user_id AS user_attempt_user_id, wr.id AS user_attempt_record_id, NULL AS user_attempt_test_id, NULL AS user_attempt_passage_id, wr.question_id AS user_attempt_question_id, NULL AS user_attempt_session_id, NULL AS user_attempt_user_answer, NULL AS user_attempt_correct, wr.ai_score AS user_attempt_score, wr.ai_score AS user_attempt_total_score, NULL AS user_attempt_feedback, wr.ai_feedback AS user_attempt_ai_feedback, wr.ai_score AS user_attempt_ai_score, wr.text_content AS user_attempt_text_content, wr.extracted_text AS user_attempt_extracted_text, NULL AS user_attempt_transcript, NULL AS user_attempt_audio_url, wr.input_type AS user_attempt_answer_status, wr.ai_status AS user_attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(wr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS user_attempt_created_time FROM writing_record wr JOIN writing_question wq ON wq.id = wr.question_id AND wq.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.id = #{recordId} AND wr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT 'speaking' AS module, NULL AS ask_scene,
NULL AS test_id, NULL AS passage_id,
'speaking' AS question_module, 'question' AS question_object_type, sq.id AS question_id, NULL AS question_test_id, NULL AS question_passage_id, sq.id AS question_question_id, NULL AS question_record_id, COALESCE(sq.topic_key, CONCAT(sq.part, ' ', sq.sub_type)) AS question_title, NULL AS question_test_title, NULL AS question_passage_title, sq.cue_card AS question_content, sq.cue_card AS question_passage_content, sq.question_text AS question_question_text, NULL AS question_correct_answer, NULL AS question_explanation, sq.display_order AS question_question_number, sq.sub_type AS question_question_type, 'SPEECH' AS question_answer_mode, NULL AS question_options_json, NULL AS question_accepted_answers_json, sq.cue_card AS question_cue_card, NULL AS question_transcript_text, NULL AS question_audio_url, NULL AS question_audio_object_key, NULL AS question_image_url, sq.part AS question_task_type,
'speaking' AS user_attempt_module, sr.user_id AS user_attempt_user_id, sr.id AS user_attempt_record_id, NULL AS user_attempt_test_id, NULL AS user_attempt_passage_id, sr.question_id AS user_attempt_question_id, sr.session_id AS user_attempt_session_id, NULL AS user_attempt_user_answer, NULL AS user_attempt_correct, sr.overall_score AS user_attempt_score, sr.overall_score AS user_attempt_total_score, sr.feedback AS user_attempt_feedback, NULL AS user_attempt_ai_feedback, sr.overall_score AS user_attempt_ai_score, NULL AS user_attempt_text_content, NULL AS user_attempt_extracted_text, sr.transcript AS user_attempt_transcript, sr.audio_url AS user_attempt_audio_url, sr.answer_status AS user_attempt_answer_status, sr.ai_status AS user_attempt_ai_status, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS user_attempt_created_time FROM speaking_record sr JOIN speaking_question sq ON sq.id = sr.question_id AND sq.is_deleted = 0 AND sq.active = 1 WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.id = #{recordId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
